projects.title: Danone Data Engineer Test
projects.description: Technical screening covering web scraping (117 laptops across 20 pages), PostgreSQL data ingestion with regex-based spec parsing, and email regex validation — all passing 9/9 test cases.
projects.longDescription: End-to-end solution for a 3-task Data Engineer technical test. Task 1: Scraped 117 laptops from a paginated e-commerce site using Python + BeautifulSoup, exported to CSV. Task 2: Loaded the CSV into PostgreSQL and wrote SQL queries using regex to extract structured fields (screen size, HDD) from raw spec strings. Task 3: Derived and validated a regex pattern for email addresses from implicit rules — 9/9 test cases passing.

stats.sql parsing: regex extraction — screen size & HDD from spec string

highlights: Full pagination handling — auto-detects total pages and scrapes all 20
SQL queries use PostgreSQL regex to extract Screen_Size and HDD directly from the spec column
Handles mixed formats: GB, TB, SSD variants, and multi-value storage specs
Regex pattern derived from implicit rules across 9 test cases — no hyphens, max one dot, must start with a letter
All 3 tasks delivered as clean, documented Python and SQL files

projects.title: Earthquake Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end data pipeline analyzing 10+ years of global earthquake activity for DataTalks.Club Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2026
projects.longDescription: Comprehensive data engineering project analyzing global earthquake activity (2015-2025) using the USGS Earthquake Catalog. Built as the final project for DataTalks.Club Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2026, answering critical questions about earthquake patterns, frequency, and distribution across the Ring of Fire region.

stats.architecture: USGS API → Kestra → GCS → BigQuery → dbt → Looker Studio

highlights: Final project for DataTalks.Club Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2026
Complete cloud-native data pipeline on Google Cloud Platform
Infrastructure as Code using Terraform
Modern orchestration with Kestra (workflow automation)
Data lake architecture with Google Cloud Storage
Enterprise data warehouse with BigQuery (partitioned + clustered tables)
Data transformations with dbt (version-controlled SQL)
Interactive dashboards with Looker Studio
Analyzes real-world earthquake patterns affecting millions globally
Answers critical questions: frequency changes, country comparisons, magnitude distribution

projects.title: FreshCart E-commerce Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: Production-grade batch pipeline orchestrating 2 years of synthetic Indonesian retail data through a medallion architecture using Apache Airflow, dbt, and BigQuery.
projects.longDescription: End-to-end data engineering pipeline simulating a real-world Indonesian e-commerce analytics platform. Generates 150K+ order records using Faker (id_ID locale), orchestrates the full ETL with Apache Airflow on Docker, transforms data through Bronze → Silver → Gold medallion layers with dbt, and surfaces business metrics — daily GMV trends, product performance rankings, and customer RFM segmentation — via Looker Studio dashboards.

stats.metrics: Daily GMV · Product ranking · Customer RFM segmentation

highlights: 7-task Airflow DAG: data generation → GCS upload → BigQuery load → dbt bronze → silver → gold → test
Medallion architecture: Bronze (raw views), Silver (cleaned tables), Gold (business metrics)
Customer RFM segmentation scoring buyers into Champions, Loyal, At Risk, Lost and 6 more segments
Seasonal demand patterns — Ramadan surge, Harbolnas 11.11 & 12.12 spikes baked into synthetic data
11 dbt models with 20+ automated data quality tests on all primary keys and critical columns
Fully Dockerized Airflow setup — clone, fill .env, run docker compose up and the pipeline runs
